name: SLIM
fact: Japan's Smart Lander demonstrated pinpoint precision landing — targeting within 100 m accuracy vs the km-scale standard of all previous missions. Landed tilted, losing primary power, but eventually the solar panels faced the sun and operations resumed. Japan became the fifth nation to achieve a lunar soft landing.
capability: Pinpoint landing accuracy — bridges the gap between 'we can land somewhere on this body' and 'we can land at the specific scientifically valuable rock', the precondition for surface-asset rendezvous on Mars.
